---
title: "About"
---

::: {.page-title}
I am an MSc Business Analytics student at Dublin City University with an interest in data analytics, machine learning, NLP, and business strategy.
:::

::: {.content-page}
::: {.profile-panel}
![](images/logo.png){fig-alt="Sahil Bhattacharya logo"}

::: {.profile-copy}
### Sahil Ashish Bhattacharya

My academic work sits at the intersection of technical analysis and business decision-making. I enjoy working with data end-to-end: understanding the problem, preparing the dataset, building analytical models, and communicating insights clearly to technical and non-technical audiences.

I am particularly interested in practical applications of AI and machine learning, especially where analytics can improve customer strategy, operational decisions, and digital products.
:::
:::

## Education

**MSc Business Analytics**  
Dublin City University · Dublin, Ireland · 2024-Present

## Professional Interests

::: {.details-list}
::: {.detail-item}
**Applied Machine Learning**  
Building and evaluating models that address real business questions.
:::

::: {.detail-item}
**Natural Language Processing**  
Exploring transformer models, text classification, and generative AI workflows.
:::

::: {.detail-item}
**Customer Analytics**  
Using behavioural data to understand segmentation, retention, and customer lifetime value.
:::

::: {.detail-item}
**Data Communication**  
Turning technical findings into clear recommendations, visuals, and written insight.
:::
:::

## Contact

<div class="contact-methods compact">
<a class="contact-row contact-email" href="mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com">
<span class="contact-label">Email</span>
<span>saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com</span>
</a>

<div class="social-icon-row" aria-label="Social profile links">
<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn profile">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
<span>LinkedIn</span>
</a>

<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://github.com/Saahil0206" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub profile">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i>
<span>GitHub</span>
</a>
</div>

<a class="button" href="cv/sahil-bhattacharya-cv.pdf" target="_blank">Download CV</a>
</div>
:::
